HOUSE PART ROLES — teach me architecture

My houses were texture rectangles because I don't know which of your pieces does which JOB. Every approved building-scale piece (your TOO-SMALL flags were right, these are structures) shown big. Tap its role: roof ridge, roof edge/eave, roof fill, wall face, corner, foundation, ruin dressing, or not a house part. Notes for facing direction. The factory rebuilds on YOUR anatomy. Autosaves every tap.
